name: Berkley Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Berkley Community Center in Norfolk, VA! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: CoVA Tennis & Sports Center
description: Come play pickleball at CoVA Tennis & Sports Center in Norfolk, VA! There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Fergus Reid Tennis Park
description: Come play pickleball at Fergus Reid Tennis Park in Norfolk, VA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Lafayette park
description: Come play pickleball at Lafayette park in Norfolk, VA! There are 2 outdoor asphalt and concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: MacArthur Center
description: MacArthur Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Norfolk, VA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: NH-30 Gym
description: Located in the gym at NSA Hampton Roads

name: North Fox Hall Park
description: Playground for kids with one pickleball playground

name: Ocean View Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Ocean View Community Center in Norfolk, VA! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: ODU Folkes Stevens Tennis Center
description: ODU Folkes Stevens Tennis Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Norfolk, VA. There are 8 hard courts. 4 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to locker rooms, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts can be reserved.
open_play_schedule: Play every morning 8-11 Mostly league play in the evenings
fees: Fee required — Members 5$ indoor free outdoors non members 15$ indoor 10$ outdoor

name: The Salvation Army Hampton Roads Kroc Center
description: The Salvation Army Hampton Roads Kroc Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Norfolk, VA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, locker rooms, and water. Reservations are available.
fees: Members only — $5 Drop-In for Non-Members to play pickleball.
